name: Poison
description: Takes INT/4 damage at the start of each turn; lasts 3 turns

name: Burn
description: Takes 2 fire damage at the start of each turn; lasts 3 turns

name: Bleed
description: Takes 1 physical damage at the start of each turn; lasts 4 turns

name: Frozen
description: Cannot act for 1 turn; physical attacks remove the effect

name: Blind
description: 50% chance to miss physical attacks for 2 turns

name: Curse
description: A random negative status effect is applied at the start of each turn; lasts 2 turns

name: Regen
description: Restores 2 HP at the start of each turn; lasts 3 turns

name: Shell
description: Reduces all incoming damage by 2 for 2 turns
